exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.note: You were targeting 57.5–60s last session — 60s is the standard now. Controlled lower, drive up. 1-2 RIR on last set.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: Up 5 lb from 135. Pull elbows back, chest stays up, brief pause at the top. Don't let the weight yank you forward.

exercises.name: Incline DB Bench
exercises.note: Hold at 60s — push for 12 clean reps on the last set. Elbows at 45°, full range. If you get 12x3 cleanly you go to 62.5 next session.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: Up 5 lb from 120. Pull bar to upper chest, lean back slightly, squeeze lats at bottom. Don't swing.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Up from 15s. Lead with elbows, thumbs slightly down, stop at shoulder height. No momentum — if you're swinging, drop to 15s.

exercises.name: Arms Superset — Hammer Curl + Rope Pushdown
exercises.detail: Hammer Curl 27.5 lb × 10 + Rope Pushdown 77 lb × 12 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: No rest between curl and pushdown. Hammer curl: neutral grip, full extension at bottom. Pushdown: split rope at bottom, lock elbows in.

exercises.name: Core Circuit
exercises.detail: Dead Bugs × 10/side + Side Plank 30s/side + Pallof Press 20 lb × 10/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Controlled and deliberate. Dead bugs: low back stays flat on floor. Side plank: hips don't sag. Pallof: resist rotation, don't let the cable pull you.

week.note: Flat bench / cable row / lat pulldown focus
Leg press / hip thrust / KB swings
